narrativeProgression.summary: Metadata drift appears between duplicate files and erodes confidence.
narrativeProgression.beatNarrative: A patient record edited at 1:08 arrives by email with your profile in attending notes.

threadUpdates.update: Night Update: A patient record edited at 1:08 arrives by email with your profile in attending notes.
Peripheral signal tied to Orderly shift recording remains unresolved.
Minor anomaly logged but not yet actionable.
No new movement on false lead this cycle.
Subtle repetition appears in unrelated communications.

evidenceDrops.title: Ward 1908 - Day 02 handwritten note
evidenceDrops.summary: Artifact advances verified evidence chain and supports deduction around Orderly shift recording.

imagePrompt.style: hyper-realistic forensic horror, analog imperfection, grounded true-crime framing
imagePrompt.prompt: Ward 1908 ARG artifact Day 02. Type: handwritten_note. Clue focus: Orderly shift recording. Location: Decommissioned hilltop hospital and sub-basement records wing. Phase: Discovery & Curiosity. Camera: Canon EOS R6, 35mm prime, ISO 3200, f/1.8, 1/40 shutter. Visual defects: sensor noise, halation bloom, slight motion blur, fingerprint smudge, timestamp burn-in. Lighting: practical sodium-vapor spill with deep shadow falloff, imperfect white balance. Composition: evidence-forward framing, handwritten marks, believable wear, no cinematic polish. No intentional misdirection.
imagePrompt.negativePrompt: clean CGI, fantasy look, glossy studio lighting, over-sharpened edges, watermark, logo, gore fetish, cartoon style

audioPrompt.style: psychological dread, industrial ambience, noisy field recording authenticity
audioPrompt.prompt: Ward 1908 handwritten_note audio cue for day 2. Clue anchor: Orderly shift recording. Phase: Discovery & Curiosity. Texture: low drone bed, distant metallic resonance, intermittent room-tone dropouts. Include one decipherable spoken fragment and one environmental clue (HVAC hum, rail click, siren bleed, pager chirp). Add mild tape flutter, codec smear, clipped transients, and uneven dynamic floor to keep it grounded.

interactions.messageTemplate: {{player_alias}}, before you move: chain-of-custody on today's drop is unstable. Confirm Orderly shift recording and tell me if your last call still stands (decision.day_01.primary).
I heard my own words on a line I never called. If you still trust {{trusted_contact}}, do not forward this to the wrong desk.
Off-record: I can publish tonight, but your previous choice is already circulating. I need one verification point tied to Orderly shift recording.

puzzle.title: Day 02 Puzzle
puzzle.objective: Use the new evidence and prior logs to resolve contradiction around Orderly shift recording.
instructions: Extract timestamp, sender route, and one lexical anomaly from today's artifacts.
Compare against at least one artifact from a previous day.
Submit a concise deduction statement before unlocking the next high-risk contact.
hintLadder: Hint 1: One timestamp appears valid but is offset from device timezone.
Hint 2: Cross-check sender metadata against yesterday's call-log route.
Hint 3: The answer keyword starts with ORDE.
puzzle.failureConsequence: Next day unlock remains delayed until one additional interaction is logged.

awarenessMoments.trigger: if decision.log contains any entry for previous day
awarenessMoments.lineTemplate: You repeated yesterday's pattern ({{last_major_choice}}). People who survive this case learn faster.

adaptiveLines: Reference previous choice without breaking realism.
Acknowledge response latency as if monitored by live actors.
Escalate or soften tone based on trust flags and solved puzzles.
